arts.ttl: Injury worries continue for Real Madrid as another defender set to miss Sevilla clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid have nothing to play for in their final two matches of the season, but they will still be keen to pick up two wins in order to end Carlo Ancelotti’s second spell as manager on a high note. But their chances of success in this weekend’s fixture against Sevilla look to have been […] The post Injury worries continue for Real Madrid as another defender set to miss Sevilla clash appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid recover two players for Sevilla clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid are set to recover a pair of players for their upcoming meeting with Sevilla. That’s according to Diario AS, who have on Friday provided an…
